name: engineering
description: All-purpose engineering pipeline. Uses goon's built-in 9-phase flow (triage → confirm_repo → approve_plan → execute → test → verify → update_memory → open_pr → notify) with every hook populated. Recommended starting point for any code-tickets workflow.

after_execute: echo '✓ all plan steps completed for {{.Key}}'
on_failure: echo 'workflow failed for {{.Key}} — see goon logs --tail=50' >&2
